name: navigateToProduct
description: Navigate to a specific product details page. Use this when user wants to see details, view, or go to a specific product. The system will find the product by name, category, or brand. Examples: 'show me the mechanical keyboard', 'go to that black dress', 'view the AUSK headphones'.

parameters.description: The name, description, or identifying features of the product to navigate to. Can be product name, category, brand, or a combination. Examples: 'mechanical keyboard', 'black dress', 'AUSK headphones', 'wireless mouse'.
